query:
SELECT id         as "id!: Uuid",
                      project_id as "project_id!: Uuid",
                      name,
                      color      as "color!",
                      sort_order as "sort_order!: i32",
                      hidden     as "hidden!: bool",
                      created_at as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
               FROM project_statuses
               WHERE project_id = $1
               ORDER BY sort_order ASC
